query:
SELECT
  DATE(paid_at) AS paid_date,
  SUM(total_amount) AS cache_total,
  SUM(principal_amount) AS cache_principal,
  SUM(interest_amount) AS cache_interest,
  SUM(fee_amount) AS cache_fee,
  SUM(penalty_amount) AS cache_penalty,
  SUM(overpaid_amount) AS cache_overpaid,
  COUNT(*) AS cache_rows
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND DATE(paid_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-04-30'
GROUP BY DATE(paid_at)
ORDER BY paid_date ASC
LIMIT 10;
